title: CreateEventSourceMappingRequest
description: Request body for creating an event source mapping

EventSourceArn.description: The ARN of the event source. Required for Kinesis, DynamoDB Streams, SQS, MQ, MSK, and DocumentDB.

FunctionName.description: The name or ARN of the Lambda function

Enabled.description: If true, the event source mapping is active

BatchSize.description: Maximum number of records in each batch

MaximumBatchingWindowInSeconds.description: Maximum time to gather records before invoking

ParallelizationFactor.description: Number of batches to process concurrently per shard
